subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to set up a 30-minute call to explore a potential partnership.

We can offer the following windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, please send over your preferred 30-minute slot within the window and we can take it from there.

I’m not able to share direct internal contact details or phone numbers. For the appropriate public contact channels, please refer to our public website.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
